# Christopher Mercer

> Systems architect designing and shipping blockchain protocol infrastructure, governance systems, and large-scale data pipelines.

## About

Christopher Mercer is a systems architect who designs complex infrastructure across blockchain protocols, governance frameworks, DeFi, and large-scale data systems. He works across the full vertical — from consensus-layer protocol design to smart contracts, interfaces, and data pipelines — designing and personally shipping end to end. Traditional finance background with a systems engineering discipline applied to everything.

## What He Designs & Builds

### Protocol Architecture
Designs and implements consensus-layer upgrades across multiple blockchain clients written in different languages (Go, JVM/Scala, Java). Integrates execution-layer proposals spanning dynamic fee markets, account abstraction, and transient storage. Coordinates cross-client validation on live testnets.

### Governance & Smart Contract Systems
Architects governance systems from soulbound NFT-based voting to DAO frameworks to prediction-market futarchy using logarithmic scoring AMMs. Designs name service registries, DEX infrastructure, and token launch platforms. Rigorous formal testing — fuzz, invariant, security proofs.

### Full-Stack Web3 Interfaces
Designs contracts and builds the interfaces. TypeScript, React, wagmi/viem, WebGL, on-chain analytics dashboards. Single architect across the entire stack — no handoff between contract design and user experience.

### Data Architecture
Designs pipelines processing over a billion records. Performance-engineered storage with order-of-magnitude throughput improvements. Multi-pass LLM enrichment. Full-text search infrastructure across millions of documents.

## How He Works

Built AI-augmented development infrastructure — custom agentic workflows with model routing by task complexity, automated quality enforcement, zero-marginal-cost mechanical automation. Systems architecture applied to the development process itself.

## Focus Areas

- Protocol Architecture
- Smart Contract Systems
- Governance Design
- Full-Stack Web3
- Data Infrastructure
- AI-Augmented Development
